hero.title: One roof, every process.
hero.intro: A specialised, section-by-section manufacturing process for saddlery, harness, belts and pet accessories - traditional hand craftsmanship where it matters, modern machinery where it counts.
hero.imageAlt: Production line at Kings International, Kanpur

floorSection.heading: Section by section, hide to dispatch.

items.title: Saddle Section
items.body: Dedicated to crafting saddles, harnesses, and equestrian accessories - leather selection, cutting & shaping, hand and machine stitching, fitting, and final quality control.

items.title: Pre-Shaped Component Cutting Area
items.body: Leather is precisely cut into pre-defined shapes using advanced cutting machinery, minimising waste while preserving texture and quality.

items.title: Strap Cutting & Splitting Area
items.body: Precise cutting and splitting of leather into straps for belts, saddlery, and pet accessories, controlling width, thickness, softness and strength.

items.title: Machine & Hand Stitching Areas
items.body: Industrial stitching machines handle high-volume, consistent seams; skilled artisans hand-stitch detailed and custom work for premium finishing.

items.title: Hole Punching, Stamping, Creasing & Skiving
items.body: Specialised finishing processes - hole punching for buckles and fastenings, stamping for logos and branding, creasing for clean edges, skiving for smooth, stitch-ready edges.

items.title: Raw Material Storage
items.body: Controlled storage for hides, leather, threads, zippers, hardware, chemicals, and dyes, protecting materials from moisture and temperature damage.

items.title: Packing & Dispatch Area
items.body: Final quality check, protective packing, and shipment preparation with tracking documentation before dispatch.

cta.heading: See the floor before you place the order.
